prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact target-hit bloom with a bright ivory-white flash core, polished silver petals, champagne rim highlights, and a few crisp neutral shard fragments. Make it the clearest and most premium-read layer in the set, readable at small size and strong in battle hit-stop. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no oversized blast cloud, no neon overload, no elemental color cast
notes: Hero impact bloom for the shared colorless style.
